extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked on the final climb, dropped FROOME Chris by 1:30+, extended GC lead with summit victory.
tactical_patterns: YATES Simon accelerated when PINOT Thibaut showed puffing weakness, exploiting teammate-isolated rivals rather than waiting for steeper gradients.
DUMOULIN Tom chased for bonus seconds despite already limiting losses, revealing concern about YATES's margin even mid-stage.
CARAPAZ Richard attacked for MOVISTAR before POZZOVIVO Domenico cracked, sacrificing domestique to test SKY's isolation before final kilometers.
FROOME Chris finished 1:30+ down after previous day's Zoncolan effort, confirming multi-stage damage rather than single-day weakness.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: hammered rhythm on climb when PINOT showed weakness, demonstrating race-reading ability beyond raw power
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: 1:30+ loss suggests Zoncolan累积damage, uncharacteristic isolation indicates SKY tactical failure
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: chased bonus seconds despite limiting losses, showing GC anxiety but no ability to distance rivals
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: puffing visibly before summit triggered YATES acceleration, telegraphed weakness at critical moment
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: cracked after CARAPAZ Richard's probing attack, unable to follow when pace lifted
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: attacked for MOVISTAR before summit to test rivals, tactical sacrifice role suggests team confidence
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: neutral: made early breakaway on rolling terrain, positioning for stage hunting despite 9s GC deficit
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: neutral: contested intermediate sprint against MODOLO Sacha despite non-sprinter profile, seeking visibility
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: neutral: led breakaway over climb then took intermediate points, maximizing KOM opportunities before selection
